name: Lobster Parisienne
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove lobster meat from tails. Reserve tails. Chop meat into bite-sized pieces. Combine remaining ingredients and blend well. Add chopped lobster, blending with a fork, and refrigerate until chilled.
2. To serve, stuff lobster tails with chilled lobster mixture. Serve as the first course on lettuce-lined small plates.
